introSection: Pegasus is a steel roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. It opened in 2006 as the seventh roller coaster at the park. Built by Mack Rides, it is the first installation of the YoungSTAR Coaster model. The front of the train is a pegasus.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Guests had the option of riding the attraction with virtual reality in 2016; this was removed at the end of the year to improve throughput.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows. First car has only one row. In total 18 riders per train.

fullText:
Pegasus is a steel roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. It opened in 2006 as the seventh roller coaster at the park. Built by Mack Rides, it is the first installation of the YoungSTAR Coaster model. The front of the train is a pegasus.

Guests had the option of riding the attraction with virtual reality in 2016; this was removed at the end of the year to improve throughput.



2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows. First car has only one row. In total 18 riders per train.
